parsed_review.summary: CP00-221 is a descriptor-only DMS-core permission workflow slice pack (RP06.P06.M03.S09-RP06.P06.M04.S23, risk B, 40 units: M03 tail=17, M04 head=23). Independent read-only inspection (Read/Grep/Glob) confirms the pack-level descriptor-verified claim is fully supported and all stated boundaries hold. (1) Coverage/distribution: deliverable {impl:11, ui:8, claude_review:3, security_audit:8, test:8, hermes_evidence:2}=40 and micro-title {Primary Implementation Slice:17, Secondary Workflow Slice:23} are mutually consistent across the review baseline, closeout-pack-plan.json, manifest plan_binding_snapshot + included_units, DMS_CORE_CP221_REQUIREMENTS, and the contract. (2) Implementation: all 7 required exports (createDmsCoreCp221PermissionWorkflowSliceDescriptor/CaseSet, validateDmsCoreCp221Coverage/PermissionWorkflowSliceDescriptor, createDmsCoreCp221HermesEvidencePacket/ClaudeReviewPacket/CloseoutHandoff) exist and are surfaced via index.js wildcard re-export (explaining why index.js is unmodified). freezeCp221Result forces every runtime/write/leak flag false; row extras are descriptor booleans only; no runtime-enabling true value was found. (3) Authority boundary preserved: claude_is_final_approval=false, local_validation_claims_enterprise_trust=false, human_final_approval_required_for_runtime_opening=true; promotes_claude_to_final_approval=false and claims_enterprise_trust_from_local_validation=false — enforced in service, mirrored in dms-core-contract.json, asserted by validators.js and model.test.js. Claude remains read-only (allowed_tools Read/Grep/Glob) and is not a final approver. (4) Hermes control-plane pattern is used only for deterministic review packet/receipt (emits_hermes_runtime_receipt=false, receipt_shape descriptor_only_permission_workflow_slice_no_write); no product runtime execution. (5) CP178+ review hardening: forbidden_review_evidence rejects auth_failure, stdout_0_bytes, malformed_json, fenced_json_plus_prose, tool_call_shaped_output, claude_final_approval_claim, source_mutation_claim, production_or_enterprise_trust_claim. (6) No-write/no-real-data: comprehensive attestation across registry/contract/service; secret and real-data scans returned nothing. (7) Local validation evidence: command-evidence.json records all pre-review gates (closeout-pack-plan:validate, rp05/rp06 validate, weighted/spec/rp00/goal/fullplan validate, npm test, npm run validate, npm run build, git diff --check) at exit 0, with closeout-pack:validate correctly deferred to the post-review gated set since it requires this review result; production_ready=false is the correct implemented_pending_review state. Forward-referenced evidence (claude-review-result.json, adjudication.md, construction-inspection.json) is produced later in the hardened_review_sequence and is expected to be absent at review time — not a defect. No P0/P1/P2/P3 issues identified; pack and goal closeout are not blocked by this independent review (human final approval remains required and is handled outside this receipt).
